'''Kadron''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Onderonian military]]. Assigned to the position of head of [[Iziz Royal Palace|Royal Palace]] security in the Onderonian capital of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]], he was the leader of the [[Onderon Royalist|Royalist]] forces protecting [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Talia (Onderon)|Talia]] from her cousin, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vaklu]] who, with the help of [[Sith Triumvirate|Sith]] forces, attempted a [[Onderon Civil War|''coup d'etat'']] to oust the Queen and lead [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] to secede from the Republic.

{{GameLS|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords}}
When [[Meetra Surik]] arrived on Onderon in response to [[Kavar]]'s request for assistance, relayed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] under [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Canderous Ordo]], she eventually fought her way through Vaklu supporters along the [[Sky Ramp]], entering the Palace and linking up with Captain Kadron once inside. He requested that Surik neutralize the efforts of a [[Kiph|slicer]], employed by Vaklu, who was subverting the Palace's security systems in an effort to halt Royalist reinforcements.
{{Endgame}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
